Years of Calicut cooking heritage
Our Story

Spice routes,
sea breeze,
served fresh.

Pepper Calicut began with one promise — to bring the soul of Malabar cooking to Bengaluru without shortcuts. Our masalas are roasted in-house, our biryani rests under dum, and our porottas are folded by hand the way grandmothers in Calicut have done it for generations.

Hand-folded
Porottas, every morning
Slow-dum
Biryanis, never reheated
Roasted
Spices, ground in-house
3 km
Free home delivery
The Menu

Crafted in Calicut. Loved in Bengaluru.
